item.title: A New LLM Architecture for Efficient Reasoning
item.description: We propose a novel architecture that improves LLM reasoning efficiency by 40% through a modified attention mechanism with mixture of experts.
item.dc:creator: John Doe, Jane Smith (Google DeepMind)

item.title: Optimal Transport Methods for Protein Folding
item.description: We apply optimal transport theory to protein structure prediction, achieving state-of-the-art results on CASP15.
item.dc:creator: Alice Bob (MIT)

item.title: Scaling RLHF with Synthetic Preferences
item.description: We demonstrate that synthetic preference data can replace human annotations for RLHF at scale, reducing alignment cost by 10x.
item.dc:creator: Charlie Delta (Anthropic)
